Heald Street Orchards. Around 40 acres of feral apple and pear orchards growing up with crabapple, sugar maple, white oak, shagback hickory, blackcherry, chokecherry, highbush/lowbush blueberry, strawberry, black & honey locust, concord grape, catalpa, staghor
